reasoning_chain: The road features a single dashed white centerline and right-hand traffic, consistent with Portugal’s driving conventions.
Stone dry-wall fences are prevalent across rolling green hills, a hallmark of rural Portuguese landscapes, especially in the north.
A solitary oak tree and sparse vegetation under overcast skies suggest a temperate maritime climate typical of northern Portugal.
